input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.6.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.6.2.3
            TITLE: any low pressure flexible fuel lines must be one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.3: Any Low Pressure flexible Fuel Lines must be one of:
IC.6.2.3 Any Low Pressure flexible Fuel Lines must be one of: 
• Metal braided hose with threaded fittings (crimped on or reusable) 
• Reinforced rubber hose with some form of abrasion resistant protection

final_answer: Any Low Pressure flexible Fuel Lines must be one of: • Metal braided hose with threaded fittings (crimped on or reusable) • Reinforced rubber hose with some form of abrasion resistant protection
